start_app = None

    def test_counter_undo_redo_flow(start_app):
        """End-to-end: Inc x3 -> 3, Dec x1 -> 2, Undo -> 3, Undo -> 2, Redo -> 3.
    
        Final UI count is 3, and Liveblocks Storage `count` should match.
        """

            browser = p.chromium.launch(headless=True)
            context = browser.new_context()
            page = context.new_page()
